vcs.meta.title: Vela Wallet Chain Setup - BiuBiu Tools
vcs.meta.description: Prepare any EVM chain for Vela Wallet. Check and deploy required smart contracts with step-by-step guidance.
vcs.title: Vela Wallet Chain Setup
vcs.subtitle: Prepare any EVM chain for Vela Wallet in a few simple steps
vcs.search.placeholder: Search by chain name or Chain ID...
vcs.search.noResults: No chains found. Try a different search term.
vcs.checking.title: Checking chain compatibility...
vcs.checking.subtitle: Verifying required contracts on {chainName}
vcs.results.title: Chain Status
vcs.results.needsSetup: Some contracts need to be deployed
vcs.step.title: Next Step
vcs.arachnid.title: Deploy Deployment Proxy
vcs.arachnid.description: This chain needs a base deployment tool installed first. This is a one-time setup that anyone can do.
vcs.arachnid.step1.title: Step 1: Fund the deployer
vcs.arachnid.step1.description: Send a small amount of {symbol} to the deployer address below. This covers the gas fee for creating the deployment tool.
vcs.arachnid.step2.title: Step 2: Deploy
vcs.arachnid.step2.description: Click the button below to broadcast the deployment transaction. No wallet connection needed — this uses a pre-signed transaction.
vcs.safeFactory.title: Safe Singleton Factory
vcs.safeFactory.description: This contract must be deployed by the Safe team. It cannot be deployed by anyone else.
vcs.safeFactory.step1: Visit the Safe Singleton Factory GitHub repository
vcs.safeFactory.step2: Open a new issue requesting deployment to your chain
vcs.safeFactory.step3: Include the chain name, Chain ID, and an RPC URL
vcs.safeFactory.step4: The Safe team will review and deploy (usually within a few days)
vcs.safeFactory.note: This is a standard process. Many chains already have this deployed. Once the Safe team deploys it, come back and check again.
vcs.entrypoint.title: Deploy EntryPoint
vcs.entrypoint.description: The EntryPoint enables smart wallet transactions (account abstraction). It's deployed through the Deployment Proxy.
vcs.safeContracts.title: Deploy Vela Wallet Contracts
vcs.safeContracts.description: These contracts enable Vela Wallet to work on this chain. They're deployed through the Safe Singleton Factory.
vcs.complete.title: Chain is Ready!
vcs.complete.description: {chainName} is fully set up for Vela Wallet. You can now go back to Vela Wallet and add this network.
vcs.info.whatIsThisAnswer: Vela Wallet is a smart wallet that uses passkeys (fingerprint/Face ID) instead of seed phrases. For it to work on a new chain, several smart contracts need to be deployed first. This tool guides you through that process.
vcs.info.isFreeAnswer: Deploying contracts requires a small amount of the chain's native token to pay for gas fees. The tool itself is free.
vcs.info.isItSafeAnswer: Yes. All contracts deployed are official, audited open-source contracts from the Safe and ERC-4337 ecosystems. The addresses are deterministic — the same contracts are deployed at the same addresses on every chain.
